acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, the app is free to use and includes optional in-app purchases for premium features.

mainEntity.name: How safe is my dream data?

acceptedAnswer.text: Your privacy is our priority. All dream data stays on your device; there is no cloud requirement or data tracking.

mainEntity.name: How does the AI dream analysis work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ethyria uses advanced AI models to interpret your dreams based on psychological methods like C.G. Jung and Sigmund Freud.

mainEntity.name: Which analysis modes does Ethyria offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ethyria offers 5 analysis perspectives: Symbol Analysis, Emotion Profile, Pattern Recognition, Scientific Classification, and an Overall Synthesis.

mainEntity.name: Which devices is Ethyria available on?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ethyria is currently available for Android. An iOS version is in development.
